Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 245 

SRVC_END_DT 

LABEL: Claim Ending Date of Service 

DESCRIPTION: The date the service covered by this claim ended. For capitation premium payments, the date on 
which the period of coverage related to this payment ends/ended. 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_END_DT 

LONG NAME: SRVC_END_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT
